titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abdullah Ibn Bukayr

text: و ما كان فيه عن عبد اللّه بن بكير فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عبد اللّه ابن جعفر الحميريّ، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسن بن عليّ بن فضّال، عن عبد اللّه بن بكير.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Abdullah ibn Bukayr has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Abdullah ibn Ja'far Al-Himyari, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Faddal, from Abdullah ibn Bukayr.
